description_long: This is a rustic wooden cabin with a single-room layout, featuring rough-hewn timber walls and a simple, shed-style roof. The front facade is open, revealing a blacksmith's workshop setup with an anvil, furnace, tools, and a workbench, as well as a barrel and crate for storage. A stone chimney rises from one side, emitting puffs of smoke, and a torch is mounted near the entrance for illumination. The cabin has a single, rectangular window with blue-tinted panes on one side, framed by wooden planks. The floor is made of cobblestone, adding to the utilitarian, old-world charm. The overall appearance suggests a functional, hand-built structure suited for a craftsman or blacksmith in a historical or fantasy urban setting.
description: A rustic wooden cabin with a shed roof, open front revealing a blacksmith's workshop, stone chimney, and a single blue-paned window.
description_view_0: Side view showing the wooden plank wall and a single blue-paned window, with the stone chimney and smoke visible on the left.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the open workshop area with tools, anvil, furnace, workbench, barrel, and crate, as well as the torch and chimney.
description_view_2: Angled view highlighting both the windowed side and the open workshop, with the chimney, torch, and various workshop items visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the solid wooden plank wall and the stone chimney with smoke, no windows or doors visible.
attribute_roof_type: shed roof constructed from wooden planks, sloping in one direction with no overhangs or dormers
attribute_window_arrangement: One medium-sized, rectangular window with blue panes, centered on the left side wall, single and not grouped with others
attribute_door_placement: No exterior doors are visible; the front is fully open, serving as the main entrance and workspace access
